mano_cua.result_summary: Demo页面无UI控件配置allowEditing/allowSelfIntersection/limitMarkersToCount等全局编辑模式参数，只能通过JS API设置。工具栏编辑按钮仅以默认选项启用编辑模式。页面左半部分(0-760px)空白为布局bug。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The demo page at localhost:5500/demo/ does not provide UI controls for the specific global edit mode options (allowEditing: false, allowSelfIntersection: false, limitMarkersToCount: 1). These are Leaflet Geoman JavaScript API parameters that can only be set programmatically. The page has a global edit mode button in the toolbar, but it enables the mode with default options only. Layout bug: Left half of the page (0-760px) is completely blank. Drawing mode auto-activation bug in Editing A Polygon section. After vertex dragging, the map zooms out dramatically to show the entire (distorted) polygon.
